tests.title: Setup Discover tests data
Flyout system Emotion cache stability opening a flyout after a cascade close does not corrupt the Emotion style cache
Metrics in Discover - Add to Case should show Add to case action in chart context menu
Metrics in Discover - Breakdown by dimension should propagate field list breakdown selection to toolbar selector
Metrics in Discover - Brush to Zoom should narrow time range when brushing a chart in the grid

Metrics in Discover - Fullscreen Mode should interact with metrics in fullscreen mode
Metrics in Discover - Fullscreen Mode should persist fullscreen state during interactions
Metrics in Discover - Grid Navigation should paginate through metrics
Metrics in Discover - Grid Navigation should filter metrics using search
Metrics in Discover - Grid Navigation should render grid with wildcard TS query and WHERE filter
Metrics in Discover - Grid Navigation should update grid when selecting a breakdown dimension
Metrics in Discover - Grid should render metrics grid with cards

Metrics in Discover - Grid should render grid with LIMIT
Metrics in Discover - Grid should render grid with SORT
Metrics in Discover - Grid should not render grid with FROM command
Metrics in Discover - Grid should not render grid with STATS command
Metrics in Discover - Grid should persist grid when changing time range
Metrics in Discover - Grid should show chart actions menu on metric card

Metrics in Discover - Insights Flyout should paginate through dimensions in flyout
Metrics in Discover - Inspect should open inspector and navigate through views and tabs

Metrics in Discover - Query kickstart should enter the metrics experience when typing a TS query directly
Metrics in Discover - Save Session should save and restore a metrics session

Traces in Discover - Custom columns should display trace-specific columns in ESQL mode
